title: Smart Choice LED Flashing Dog Lead 120cm – Reflective Light-Up Safety Leash for Dogs – 3 Flash Modes – Assorted Colours – Battery Included (Orange with orange led)
features: High Visibility for Night Walks – Built-in LED lights provide visibility up to 500 metres, ensuring your dog stays seen and safe during low-light conditions.
Three Light Settings – Choose from flashing, rapid blinking, or constant light modes with an easy ON/OFF button located on the handle.
Durable & Reflective Design – Made from strong nylon with reflective stitching for added safety and durability, ideal for daily walks.
Comfort Grip Handle – Designed with a soft yet firm handle for a comfortable walking experience and secure control of your pet.
Battery Included & Ready to Use – Each lead comes with a replaceable CR2032 battery, so it's ready straight from the pack.
Generous Size – 120cm long and 2.5cm wide, suitable for most dog breeds; available in three vibrant colours (blue, orange, green).
description: Keep your dog safe and visible with the Smart Choice LED Flashing Dog Lead – the perfect solution for night-time walks, foggy mornings, or low-light conditions. With three lighting modes (flash, rapid, constant) and visibility up to 500 metres , this reflective leash ensures your pet is always seen. Crafted from durable nylon webbing , each lead features integrated LED lights , a comfortable grip handle , and reflective stitching for added visibility. Measuring 120cm x 2.5cm , it offers a secure connection between you and your pet without compromising comfort or control. Supplied in three assorted colours – blue with white LED, green with green LED, and orange with orange LED – and includes a replaceable CR2032 battery , this flashing dog lead is ready to use straight out of the box. Whether you're walking in the city, countryside or heading to the park before sunrise, this light-up dog lead offers peace of mind and style in one.
